---
name: Framework proposal
about: Propose a framework, config, code, evidence, or tooling change
title: "[Proposal] "
labels: proposal
assignees: ""
---

## Proposal summary

Describe the change in one paragraph.

## Why this belongs in Shelf

Explain why this is a framework-level, project-level, or tooling-level change instead of a one-off implementation tweak.

## Target layer

Select the main layer:

- Framework
- Config
- Code
- Evidence
- Canonical / Validation
- Shelf AI

## Structural impact

Explain the expected impact on:

- capability
- boundary
- bases
- combination rules
- verification

## Source of truth

What should become or remain the source of truth after this change?

## Expected validation impact

What validations or generated outputs are expected to change?

## Related files

List the main files you expect to touch.

## Additional notes

Anything else maintainers should know before discussing the proposal.
